title: metastelma quitense
intro: Metastelma quitense, also known as Quitense Metastelma or Yellow Glory Vine, is a flowering plant native to Peru. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Metastelma quitense include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, relieve muscle spasms, and reduce fever, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Metastelma quitense can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in herbal supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
